title: Boat Rental in Bruges Canals: Budget Guide for 2026
html:
Exploring Bruges Canals by boat does not have to break the bank; a guided shared tour starts from around €25 per person, while self-drive electric boats depart from Rozenhoedkaai from €60 per hour for two people. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators offering affordable options.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Bruges Canals?

Budget options start at €25 shared tours, and go up to €2,500 for a crewed yacht day. Prices vary by boat type and season.

For a half-day electric boat for up to 6 people, expect €120, €180. Full-day catamaran trips with skipper cost €800, €1,200. For a premium experience, browse day charters in Bruges Canals to compare verified listings and find competitive rates.

Where to set off in Bruges Canals?

The most popular departure point is Rozenhoedkaai, near the Belfry. Other real options include:

  • Bruges Marina (Jachthaven Sint-Pieters)
  • Dampoort (east side of the city)
  • Bargeplein (near ’t Zand)
  • Sluis (a nearby town with direct canal access)
  • Damme (a classic canal village 6 nautical miles east)
  • Zeebrugge (coastal port, 15 km north)

Electric and smaller motorboats navigate the inner canals; larger vessels depart from Bruges Marina or Zeebrugge for longer trips.

Which boat to rent?

  1. Electric day boat, ideal for family outings on inner canals, up to 6 guests, from €60 per hour.
  2. Motorboat (4, 6 berth), suitable for groups exploring the outer canals, up to 6 guests, from €180 half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), spacious for day trips on the North Sea, up to 10 guests, from €900 full-day.
  4. Crewed yacht (e.g. Princess F70), a luxury motor yacht for special occasions, up to 10 guests, from €2,500 per day. Visit the Princess F70 charter page for full specifications.
  5. RIB tender, a fast option for exploring the nearby coast, up to 4 guests, from €120 per hour.

Cost breakdown for Bruges Canals boat rental

  • Shared canal tour: €25, €35 per adult, 50 minutes, no licence needed.
  • Self-drive electric boat (half-day): €120, €180 for up to 6 guests.
  • Catamaran full-day (with skipper): €800, €1,200 for up to 12 guests.
  • Crewed motor yacht full-day: from €2,000 to €3,500 for up to 10 guests.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Bruges Canals?

No licence is required for electric boats under 10 hp on the inner canals, but larger boats may need an ICC. Always confirm with the operator.

For self-drive electric boats up to 10 hp, no licence is needed. For motorboats above 10 hp, an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) is typically required. The operator will specify exact requirements at booking. A useful local tip:

Book morning departures to avoid the afternoon crowds; the inner canals are calmest before 11 am, and you can tie up at a waterside cafe for lunch.

The high season runs from June to September, with August being the busiest. Prevailing south-westerly winds can affect outer canal and coastal trips.

At a glance

  • Price range: €25, €3,500 per day
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 50 minutes (shared) to 8 hours (private)
  • Guest capacity: 2, 12 guests
  • Currency: Euro (EUR)
  • Licence: Not required for small electric boats

Questions about boat rental in Bruges Canals

Can you take a boat from Bruges to the North Sea?

Yes, via the Boudewijnkanaal (Baudouin Canal), you can reach Zeebrugge in about 1.5 hours; the canal is navigable by boats up to 12 metres.

What is the best month to rent a boat in Bruges?

May or September offer pleasant weather and fewer crowds compared to July and August.

Are there any age restrictions for driving a rental boat?

Drivers must be at least 18 years old for motorboats; no minimum age for electric boats, but adult supervision is required.

Can I rent a boat for a full day and go to Damme?

Yes, the canal to Damme is 6 nautical miles east, a popular 4-hour round trip from Bruges.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Bruges Canals or list your own. Whether you choose a self-drive electric boat or a crewed luxury yacht, planning ahead ensures a smooth experience. To explore all options, visit the BoatHire24 marketplace; boat owners can also list their vessel and start earning.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Bruges Canals and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
